# AI Sonar

> Unified AI API access for text, image, audio, video, and multimodal models.

## Quick Start

Base URL: https://api.aisonar.dev/v1
Authentication: Bearer token
Console: https://console.aisonar.dev/customer

```bash
curl https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/chat/completions \
  -H "Authorization: Bearer sk-your-api-key" \
  -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  -d '{"model":"gpt-5.2","messages":[{"role":"user","content":"Hello"}]}'
```

## Documentation

- Introduction: https://docs.aisonar.dev/introduction
- Quickstart: https://docs.aisonar.dev/quickstart
- Authentication: https://docs.aisonar.dev/authentication
- Models and pricing: https://aisonar.dev/models
- API reference: https://docs.aisonar.dev/api-reference/introduction

## Common API Reference

- List models: GET https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/models
- Chat completions: POST https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/chat/completions
- Responses: POST https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/responses
- Messages: POST https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/messages
- Gemini native generate content: POST https://api.aisonar.dev/v1beta/models/{model}:generateContent
- Images: POST https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/images/generations
- Video: POST https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/videos/generations
- Audio speech: POST https://api.aisonar.dev/v1/audio/speech
- Realtime: WS wss://api.aisonar.dev/v1/realtime?model={model}
